name: VertexMaster
notes: UI mode is DIALOG; script builds a dialog with a treeview (path list), three checkboxes (Vertex, InTangent, OutTangent), and Create/Cancel buttons.
UITree captured from the success scenario; rendered via SDB to a 332×292 CSS px PNG at 2x device scale (14304 bytes).

Expression 0 ('Shape Layer 1 Vertex 1/Transform/Position'): sweeps Vertex Control slider from 1 to 4 (vertex indices on a 4-vertex ellipse). The expression calls thisComp.layer('Shape Layer 1').toComp() to transform path vertex coordinates from shape-group space to comp space. The expr-eval engine returns a stub object for thisComp.layer() that is not callable, so all 4 samples error with 'thisComp.layer(...) is not a function'. Samples left empty — expression requires the live AE runtime.

Expression 1 ('Shape Layer 1/Contents/Path 1/Path 1/Path'): sweeps time 0–5 s over 41 steps. The expression enumerates all comp layers and calls toWorld()/fromWorld() for coordinate transforms, then calls createPath() (an AE built-in). All 41 steps error with 'thisComp.layer(...) is not a function'. Samples left empty — expression requires the live AE runtime.
Both expressions are AE-runtime-only: they depend on toComp(), fromWorld(), createPath(), and multi-layer enumeration that cannot be simulated by the portable expr-eval engine.
Screenshot dimensions: 332 CSS px wide × 292 CSS px tall (664×584 physical px at 2x scale, 14304 bytes).
